Flow.description: Deleted Outcome - "Yad beYad Status change" AM: 18032025- 1863823235 - Update conditions for sms sending Eden 6.7: 2022425183 - Add checking conditions for sending wa + add new messaging component: "new_appointment_excellent_expert" Eden 15.7: 2025766751 - Change conditions for component: "wa_after_experts_appointment" Eden 21.7: 2051072263 - add new messaging component "assuta_one_took_place" Eden 1.9 - 2115891612 - הוספת תנאי מומחים לשליחת סקר מומחים Eden 15.9 - 2051072263 - Change component name to : "assuta_1_took_place" and populate parameters Eden 17.9 - 2151499365 - Change "CreatedDateAppointmentAdd45Days" formula to calculate from the date the appointment was created instead of the date the appointment took place. ortal 11.10.25 - remove domain code 412 for new_regular_appointment_experts Decision AM: 26112025- 2535880920- remove site code on decisions for assuta one (now not limited to site code= 12) AM: 05022026- 2644049158-ואלקטרופיזיולוגיה הודעות עבור צינטורים WA- adding new WA template- message_to_patient_domain_110_311 ED: 26/02/2026 - 2744476495 - Replace pre_surgery_took_place to pre_surgery_took_place_2026 FB: 01/03/2026 - 2745502434 - replace nurse_no_assesment with -- nurse_no_assesment_2026 ED: 05/03/2026 - 2699774512 - Added new messaging template "nurse_remote" when nurse ststus is 'לביצוע הערכה מרחוק' AM: 22032026- added automation name formula. change params for message_to_patient_domain_110_311 template MB - 12.04.2026 - 2835510335 - Fix Pre-Surgery Templates Logic SP: 2206202 - 3016517950- New path For Assuta Experts - sending Messaging Template regardless of payment for "home experts" calendars.

formulas.description: just to bypass facebook template laws of creating unique urls... so this has no meaning at all.

Flow.label: Surgery logic for Messaging - Appointment
